title: Services — Private Care Laundry
description: Explore our full range of laundry and specialty cleaning services.

hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Premium laundry care designed around your lifestyle.

savingBags.title: Saving Bags
savingBags.description: Fill a bag with up to 15 items for one fixed price — a convenient and cost-effective solution for regular laundry. Enjoy premium care while saving more with every order.

clothesWashing.title: Cloths Washing
clothesWashing.description: Your daily wear cleaned with expert care using high-quality processes. Each order is handled separately to ensure freshness, hygiene, and a perfect finish.

shoeCleaning.title: Shoe Cleaning
shoeCleaning.description: Specialized cleaning designed to restore your shoes' original look and feel. We treat each pair with care, preserving materials while removing dirt and stains.

bagsCleaning.title: Bags Cleaning
bagsCleaning.description: From handbags to travel bags, we provide gentle yet effective cleaning. Maintain the elegance and longevity of your bags with our expert care.

carpetCleaning.title: Carpet Cleaning
carpetCleaning.description: Deep and thorough cleaning that removes dust, stains, and odors. Bring back the comfort, cleanliness, and freshness of your carpets.

homeItems.title: Home Items
homeItems.description: Professional care for curtains, blankets, and other home essentials. Keep your living space fresh, soft, and well-maintained with ease.

corporate.title: Corporate Professionals
corporate.description: Reliable, discreet service that keeps your wardrobe ready for every meeting and trip

traditional.title: Traditional Wear Users
traditional.description: Specialized care that preserves the elegance and integrity of traditional garments

families.title: Busy Families
families.description: Effortless laundry care that keeps every outfit clean, fresh, and always ready

enthusiasts.title: Garment Care Enthusiasts
enthusiasts.description: For those who value quality and longevity — keeping fabrics in their best condition
